$comment: Normatively defined by the AIP Registry Interface Agent Registration Metadata endpoint. Response body for GET /v1/agents/{aid} when no DID-specific Accept header is used.
title: AIP Agent Registration Metadata
description: Default application/json response for GET /v1/agents/{aid}. DID Document representations are returned only through DID-specific content negotiation.

identity.description: Current Agent Identity Object for this AID.

grant_tier.description: Grant tier accepted at registration and used by Relying Parties during Step 9d Grant Tier Conformance validation.

registered_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the Registry accepted the initial Registration Envelope.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when registration metadata last changed.

public_key_uri.description: URI or relative path for GET /v1/agents/{aid}/public-key.

capability_manifest_uri.description: URI or relative path for GET /v1/agents/{aid}/capabilities.

revocation_status_uri.description: URI or relative path for GET /v1/agents/{aid}/revocation.

registration_warnings.description: Structured warnings created during registration validation. Empty when no warning applies. When Registration Check 15 accepts a Tier 2 registration without identity.model.attestation_hash, this array MUST include model_attestation_missing_tier2 and the same warning MUST be returned by POST /v1/agents and GET /v1/agents/{aid}.

source_check.description: Registration validation check that created the warning.

issued_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the Registry created the warning.

message.description: Operator-visible warning text. MUST state that the Tier 2 agent is not cryptographically pinned to a model artifact.
